ddls:
CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic (e.g., Atomic Structure and Properties) */,
  "expected_percentage" TEXT /* Expected percentage of questions for the topic (e.g., 7% to 9%) */,
  "multiple_choice_questions" INTEGER /* Number of multiple choice questions expected for the topic */,
  "free_response_questions" INTEGER /* Number of free response questions expected for the topic */,
  "approx_sessions" INTEGER /* Approximate number of sessions for the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the topic */,
  "prerequisite_topics" TEXT /* IDs of topics that should be completed before starting this topic */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic the question belongs to */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple choice, free response) */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "correct_answer" TEXT /* Correct answer for the question */,
  "explanation" TEXT /* Explanation for the correct answer */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Additional tags for the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the question */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session (e.g., Practice Session 1) */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic the session is based on */,
  "number_of_questions" INTEGER /* Number of questions in the session */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session (e.g., 45 minutes) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the session */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_questions" (
  "session_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session question */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the question belongs to */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "question_order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the session */,
  "time_limit" INTEGER /* Time limit for each question in the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_questions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_questions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, teacher, admin) */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the institution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "user_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the user session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the user session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user session (e.g., started, completed, in progress) */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score of the user in the session */,
  "total_time_taken" INTEGER /* Total time taken by the user to complete the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_answers" (
  "user_answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user answer */,
  "user_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user session */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "user_answer" TEXT /* User's answer to the question */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's answer is correct */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Time taken by the user to answer the question in seconds */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the user for their answer */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the answer (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_answers_user_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("user_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_answers_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic the resource belongs to */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., study guide, video tutorial) */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_url" TEXT /* URL of the resource */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the user in the topic */,
  "average_time_taken" INTEGER /* Average time taken by the user to answer questions in the topic */,
  "number_of_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts by the user in the topic */,
  "last_attempt_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last attempt in the topic */,
  "improvement_rate" REAL /* Rate of improvement in the user's performance in the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutional_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of students in the institution */,
  "number_of_students" INTEGER /* Number of students in the institution */,
  "number_of_sessions" INTEGER /* Number of sessions completed in the institution */,
  "number_of_topics_covered" INTEGER /* Number of topics covered by students in the institution */,
  "improvement_rate" REAL /* Rate of improvement in the institution's performance */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutional_reports_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutional_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., student, teacher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, manage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
